title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 358.170 - Liability of incoming partner
text:
358.170.  Liability of incoming partner. — A person admitted as a partner into an existing partnership is liable for all the obligations of the partnership arising before his admission as though he had been a partner when such obligations were incurred, except that this liability shall be satisfied only out of partnership property.
(L. 1949 p. 506 § 17)
